message:
style(fnp-python tests): apply rustfmt to four conformance harnesses

Pure formatting cleanup (no logic changes) across four conformance
test files in crates/fnp-python/tests/ that had drifted out of
rustfmt-clean shape since their last touch:

- conformance_argwhere.rs       — collapse 5 wrapped format!() calls
                                   that fit on one line under the
                                   default rustfmt max_width
- conformance_fp_classify.rs    — same: 4 wrapped format!() calls
                                   re-collapsed
- conformance_fp_introspect.rs  — re-wrap two 2-D test-case tuples
                                   onto multi-line form, plus collapse
                                   2 wrapped format!() calls and an
                                   over-long `let` binding
- conformance_frexp_modf.rs     — collapse a wrapped assert_eq! and
                                   re-wrap 2 long oracle-script `let`
                                   strings onto multi-line form

Diff is 39 insertions / 46 deletions across 4 files; net -7 LOC,
all rustfmt-driven. No behavior change — these are all `cargo fmt`
output for tests already in tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
